sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Biakpiakna Sangin Gamtatna tawh Thu Khenzaw

verses.text: Vanglian, Topa Pasian hong paukhia a, nisuahna leh nitumna kikal leitung mi khempeuh a khawm hi
Hoih kicin'na Zion panin Pasian hong taangkhia hi
Eite' Pasian hong pai a, amah dai ommawk lo hi. Ama mai-ah mei husia om a, a kimkotah huihpi om hi
A mite tungah thu a khen theihna dingin tunglam vantung leh leitung a sam hi
“Biakpiakna tawh, kei tungah thuciamna a bawlte, ka mi citakte ka kiangah hong khawm un,” a ci hi
Vantung in ama thumanna gen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian mahmah thukhenpa ahi hi
“Ka mite aw, ngai un; thu ka hong gen ding hi. Israel-te aw, note' langkhatah teci ka pang ding hi. Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, nomau' Pasian ka hi hi
Na biakpiakna uhah note kong mawhsak kei hi. Na meihal biaknate uh ka mai-ah om ngitnget hi
Ahi zongin na inn pan uha bawngtal hita leh na ganbuk pan uha keeltal hita leh ka hong sang kei ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak ganhingte khempeuh, mual tul tampite tunga a om ganhingte keima-a' ahi hi
Huih lak vasate khempeuh keimah in ka thei a, gamlaka gamta khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi
“Ka gil kial ta leh zong note kiang panin an kong ngen kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung leh a sunga om khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi
Bawngtalte' sa ne ding a, keelte' sisan dawn ding ka hi hiam
Lungdam biakpiakna Pasian tungah pia un la, Sangpenpa tungah na thuciamnate uh bawl un
Haksat hun ciangin keima tungah hong ko un. Note kong honkhia ding a, note in keima min nong thangsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin migilote tungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Ka thukhamte lawhna ding ka thuciamna na muk uh tawh genna ding thu nei na hi uh hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh hilh ding na ut kei uh a, ka thute na nunglam uhah na paii uh hi
Guta khat mu le uh cin ama lawm na hi pah uh a, a paktat mite tawh na kikhawl uh hi
“Na kam uh, siatna na uksak uh a, na leii un khemna a khangsak hi
Na sanggamte uh langpangin thu na gen uh a, amaute' mawhna na zong uh hi
Hihte khempeuh na gamta khin uh a, bangmah ka pau kei hi. Kei pen no tawh a kibangin nong ngaihsunkha uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in note ka hong taii a, na mawhna uh na mai uhah ka koih hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Pasian a mangngilh mite aw, hih thu ciamteh un. Tua hi kei leh note kong balgawp ding hi. Note hong honkhia ding kuamah omlo hi
Biakpiakna dingin lungdam piakna hong paipih mi in kei a hong pahtawi ahi hi. Ka thu a mang mite khempeuh ka honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi.
